rdf:Description.dc:publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft E Museo Britannico, Akademie der Wissenschaften in Hamburg

rdf:Description.dcterms:hasPart: Five untitled testimonies by Athanasius of Alexandria
Testimonies by Athanasius of Alexandria from the Homily on the Incarnation of Our Lord, two in number
Testimony by Hippolytus of Rome, i.e. Julius
Testimony by Julius of Rome from the Discourse on the Unity of Our Lord
Three untitled testimonies by Julius of Rome
Testimony by Celestine of Rome
Testimonies by Ephrem the Syrian from the homily on the Virgin Mary, two in number
Testimonies by Proclus of Cyzicus from the homily on St. Thomas, two in number
Two untitled testimonies by Proclus of Cyzicus
Testimonies by Theodotos of Ankyra from the Second Homily on the Nativity, two in number
Two untitled testimonies by Theodotos of Ankyra
Testimonies by Epiphanios of Salamis from the Ancoratus, twelve in number
Testimonies by John Chyrisostom on the homily on the Nativity, five in number
Testimonies by John Chyrisostom from the homily on the Gospel of John, five in number
Testimonies by John Chrysostom from the Homily on the Epistle to the Ephesians, seven in number
Testimonies by Cyril from the synod of Alexandria to Nestorius, five in number
Testimonies by Cyril from the letter to Nestorius, three in number
Testimonies by Cyril from the book of the Treasure, four in number
Three untitled testimonies by Cyril of Alexandria
Testimonies by Cyril from the Book of Treasure, three in number
Testimonies by Cyril from the treatise on the Unity of Christ, eight in number
Testimonies by Cyril from the Explanation of the Mystery of Christ against Nestorius, two in number
Testimonies by Severos of Antioch from the letter to the Emperor, two in number
Testimonies by Severos of Antioch from the letter to John II of Alexandria, two in number
Testimonies by Jacob of Serug from the homily on His Nativity and Baptism, two in number
Testimonies by Jacob of Serug from the homily on the salvatory Passion of Christ, two in number
Testimony by John of Antioch from the letter to Succensus
Testimonies by Ḥabib Bishop of Takrit from the letter to the Northern and Western Christians, two in number
